## Cursor Rules

This folder contains the Cursor rule files (`.mdc`) used to guide edits in this repository.

---

## Rule files (load order by `NN_` prefix)

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `01_swamy_personal_learning_only.mdc` | Always-on scope — personal learning only |
| `02_educational-content-rules.mdc` | Zero-copy policy, voice, four-layer companions |
| `03_repository-structure.mdc` | Repository structure and key paths |
| `04_quality-assurance.mdc` | QA checklists and verification expectations |
| `05_markdown-standards.mdc` | Markdown and documentation standards |
| `06_primary-directives.mdc` | Project focus and documentation accuracy |
| `07_source_material_rules.mdc` | Internal-only reference tree (read-only) |
| `08_file-naming-conventions.mdc` | Layer-aware `01`–`NN` naming |
| `09_copilot-instructions-extract.mdc` | Condensed guardrails from copilot instructions |

---

**Note:** Cursor loads all `.mdc` files in `.cursor/rules/`. A mirrored copy lives under `.github/rules/` — keep both trees aligned when editing policy.
